parent_company: Foxconn Technology Group (Hon Hai Precision Industry)
relevance_to_abf: Zhen Ding is one of the world's largest IC substrate manufacturers and a major ABF substrate producer. The company is a key supplier to leading chip designers for advanced packaging substrates. It ranks among the top 3 global IC substrate makers alongside Unimicron and Ibiden.
business_overview: Zhen Ding Technology is a leading global manufacturer of printed circuit boards (PCBs), IC substrates, and flexible printed circuits (FPCs). The company operates through four main business segments: IC substrates (including ABF substrates), HDI PCBs, flexible PCBs, and rigid PCBs. It is the largest PCB manufacturer globally by revenue and a critical supplier in the semiconductor packaging ecosystem.

market_data.stock_price_note: TWSE:4958, price data not accessible via available web sources
market_data.confidence: low - estimates based on prior reports, not verified from live sources

financials_summary.revenue_history_note: Revenue data not accessible from available web sources during this run. Wikipedia and financial data sites blocked.

products_and_technology.technology_capabilities: Advanced ABF substrate technology supporting fine-pitch BGA for leading-edge processors. Capabilities include any-layer HDI, mSAP (modified Semi-Additive Process) for SLP, and high-layer-count substrates for HPC/AI chips.
products_and_technology.key_customers: Major customers include Apple (FPC/HDI), AMD, Qualcomm, MediaTek, and other leading fabless/IDM companies for IC substrates.

strengths: World's largest PCB manufacturer by revenue
Diversified product portfolio (IC substrates, HDI, FPC, rigid PCB)
Major ABF substrate supplier alongside Unimicron/Ibiden
Key customer relationships with top-tier tech companies
weaknesses: Lower margins compared to pure-play IC substrate peers
ABF substrate market share smaller than Unimicron/Ibiden
opportunities: AI/HPC boom driving ABF substrate demand
Advanced packaging (CoWoS, 3D IC) requiring finer-pitch substrates
Substrate-like PCB (SLP) growth for mobile devices
threats: Intense competition from Unimicron, Ibiden, Shinko
US-China trade tensions affecting China operations

abf_relevance_detail: Zhen Ding is a Tier 1 ABF substrate supplier, directly competing with Unimicron and Ibiden. The company supplies ABF substrates used in advanced CPU/GPU/AI accelerator packaging. As AI chip demand surges, Zhen Ding's IC substrate business (particularly ABF) is a key growth driver. The company has been investing heavily in expanding ABF substrate capacity.
